rootCause.timerDidNotReset: Worker sharded disk reload kept stale prior-session identity (statusSeq 69 > 9) via preserveMonotonicLanes, so 8793 presence_json never advanced lastReal*At even though disk had fresh uploads.
rootCause.falseOffline: Same stale presence_json fed read cache; hard_offline_timeout on 761s-old status timestamp while disk showed fresh 14:29+ heartbeats.
rootCause.inventoryUnitWrong: Inventory age was computed from stale lastRealInventoryAt (~12m), so compact formatter showed coarse 12m instead of seconds; not a formatter bug once backend timestamps are fresh.

timerResetProof.timerResetDespiteUnchangedContent: supported by server-lane timestamp model (frontend uses _auth.lastReal*At only)

liveBrowser.note: /tracker UI requires Discord login in browser session; API lane headers and JSON verified live in browser.
